decisions_log.decision: Added SHA3-256 hash verification to reveal_vote
decisions_log.reason: Prevents judges from changing scores after seeing others' votes

decisions_log.decision: Restricted poster_weight to 30-70 range
decisions_log.reason: Prevents poster from completely overriding community judge scores

decisions_log.decision: Added admin withdrawal to treasury
decisions_log.reason: Platform fees must be recoverable for business sustainability

known_issues.issue: Hash verification uses bcs::to_bytes which may differ from client-side encoding

decisions_log.reason: Walrus network can be slow, retries improve reliability

completed: Fixed Walrus upload endpoint (PUT /v1/blobs instead of POST /v1/store)

sessions.last_session_summary: Fixed Walrus integration - upload works correctly now, but certification is asynchronous. Blobs register immediately but take 1-2 minutes to be certified by storage nodes on testnet.
changes_made: Updated walrus.js: Changed uploadBlob to use PUT /v1/blobs
Updated walrus.js: Added 5s initial delay in readBlob for CDN propagation
Updated walrus.js: Added waitForCertification method (configurable timeout)
Updated walrus.js: Added isBlobCertified method
Updated FrontendIntegration.md: Added certification delay warning

file_module_map.purpose: Walrus storage with correct endpoints and certification handling
Frontend guide with Walrus certification notes

decisions_log.decision: Use PUT /v1/blobs instead of POST /v1/store
decisions_log.reason: Walrus HTTP API uses PUT method for blob upload

decisions_log.decision: Add async certification handling
decisions_log.reason: Walrus blobs require storage node attestation before read, which happens asynchronously

known_issues: Walrus testnet blobs take 1-2 minutes to certify - this is expected behavior
errors_encountered: POST /v1/store returned 404 - fixed by using PUT /v1/blobs
Read after upload returns 404 until blob is certified - added waitForCertification
next_steps: Frontend developer to implement async upload flow with background certification
Consider webhooks for certification notification in production
Test full lifecycle with frontend
sessions.notes: Walrus upload works correctly. Certification is asynchronous - blobs register immediately but storage nodes must attest before they can be read. On testnet, this takes 1-2 minutes. Frontend should show 'uploading...' state and allow Sui transaction to proceed while certification happens in background.

Added veto_result 48h time window: finalized_at field, clock param, must be within 48h of finalize (bounty.move)

decisions_log.decision: Removed _with_judges finalize variants
decisions_log.reason: Sui Move doesn't support vector<&mut T> - can't pass multiple mutable references in a vector

decisions_log.reason: Judge/vote/finalize require complex object dependencies (JudgeProfile, VoteCommit, Treasury) - testing those requires multi-step setup that's better suited for a dedicated integration test
decisions_log.alternatives_considered: Full lifecycle test with judge + vote + finalize

decisions_log.reason: Acts as penalty reward transfer - judge loses stake but poster doesn't gain it

completed: Fixed require() crash in SiteHeader - replaced require() with ES imports + mounted guard pattern

Fixed useWallet.ts - useConnectWallet now passes wallet object to connectWallet mutation
Fixed transactions.ts - removed intermediate TransactionArgument[] for tx.pure.vector() calls (pass raw values directly)

file_module_map.purpose: Replaced require() with ES import of useWallet + mounted guard pattern (only render wallet components after hydration)
Replaced useSuiClient() with raw JSON-RPC fetch calls to avoid SSR context dependency
Added 'network: testnet' to SuiClientProvider config for proper typing
Fixed useConnectWallet to pass wallet object; added useWallets import
Fixed tx.pure.vector() calls to accept raw values instead of TransactionArgument[]

decisions_log.decision: useOnChainBounties uses raw JSON-RPC instead of dapp-kit useSuiClient
decisions_log.reason: useSuiClient() requires SuiClientProvider context which is not available during SSR; raw RPC avoids the dependency entirely

decisions_log.decision: SiteHeader uses mounted guard + ES imports instead of require()
decisions_log.reason: Vite ESM doesn't support require(); ES imports work but hooks must only be called after mount
decisions_log.alternatives_considered: Dynamic import() with hook call (violates Rules of Hooks)

errors_encountered: require() is not defined in SiteHeader.tsx DashboardLink - Vite ESM doesn't support require()
useSuiClient() throws during SSR because SuiClientProvider not mounted yet
SuiClientProvider network config missing 'network' property
transactionBlockBytes does not exist in ExecuteTransactionBlockParams - should be transactionBlock
useConnectWallet() Expected 1-2 arguments but got 0 - connectWallet mutation needs wallet object
tx.pure.vector('u8', ...) rejects TransactionArgument[] - needs raw number[]/string[]
Uint8Array not assignable to BufferSource - need explicit cast for SharedArrayBuffer compatibility
Link not imported in bounty.$id.tsx

sessions.notes: Session 025 complete. Fixed all SSR/runtime/type errors in new TanStack Start frontend. Key insight: dapp-kit hooks (useSuiClient, useConnectWallet) require context providers which aren't available during SSR - solved by using raw RPC for read operations and mounted guards for write operations. TypeScript compiles clean (0 errors). All 9 routes return 200. Next: user testing and feature verification.

completed: Fixed bounty detail 'Submit Work' button - was plain <a> tag causing full page reload that destroyed wallet connection, changed to TanStack <Link>
Fixed TanStack Router child route rendering - bounty.$id.submit.tsx was nested child but BountyDetail had no <Outlet>, added useMatchRoute + conditional Outlet
Fixed React Rules of Hooks - moved all hooks before early returns in BountyDetail

Fixed dapp-kit signAndExecute - switched from signTransaction+executeTransactionBlock (2-step) to signAndExecute (1-step) for gas coin selection, then back to signTransaction with Transaction object (not built bytes) because signAndExecute hangs on RPC execution
Fixed executeTx result parsing - signAndExecute returns {digest, rawEffects} not {effects.status}, switched back to signTransaction + suiClient.executeTransactionBlock with 30s timeout
Fixed 'No valid gas coins' - dapp-kit signTransaction expects Transaction object (calls .toJSON() internally which triggers build with gas selection)
Bounty creation now works end-to-end: Walrus upload → signTransaction → executeTransactionBlock → success
Work submission now works end-to-end: Walrus upload → signTransaction → executeTransactionBlock → success
Dashboard 'My Submissions' tab now fetches and displays user's submissions with previews (title, description from Walrus, date, blob ID)
Created submission detail page at /submission/$bountyId - shows bounty context, full submission content from Walrus, technical metadata with copy buttons
Added localStorage caching for submissions - saved on submit, read by dashboard and detail page

file_module_map.purpose: Fixed Submit Work button from <a> to <Link>, added Outlet for child routes, fixed hooks order
executeTx uses signTransaction (Transaction object) + suiClient.executeTransactionBlock with 30s timeout
Added signAndExecute + signTransaction to DappKitState and DappKitBridge
My Submissions tab now shows submissions with previews from localStorage + useMySubmissions hook
New route - submission detail page with bounty context, Walrus content, technical metadata
Added useMySubmissions hook (localStorage-based), parseBountyObject now includes submittedAddresses
Added submittedAddresses field to Bounty type
Added localStorage caching for submissions on success, 20s Walrus upload timeout

decisions_log.decision: use signTransaction (Transaction object) + executeTransactionBlock instead of signAndExecute
decisions_log.reason: signAndExecute hangs after wallet signs (RPC execution step stalls). signTransaction with raw Transaction object lets dapp-kit handle build+gas internally via .toJSON(), then we execute separately with timeout
decisions_log.alternatives_considered: signAndExecute (hangs), signTransaction with pre-built bytes (toJSON not a function)

decisions_log.decision: Use localStorage for submission caching instead of RPC sui_queryObjects
decisions_log.reason: sui_queryObjects with StructType filter returns 0 results on testnet RPC for Move structs
decisions_log.alternatives_considered: sui_queryObjects (doesn't work), event-based discovery (no events emitted)

Corporate firewall blocks Linode IPs — Walrus publishers unreachable from corporate network
sui client CLI times out to testnet (reqwest issue) — use axios for all RPC calls
sui_queryObjects with StructType filter returns 0 on testnet RPC — cannot query Submission objects on-chain
signAndExecute from dapp-kit hangs after wallet signs — must use signTransaction + executeTransactionBlock separately
errors_encountered: submit_work abort code 5: E_ALREADY_SUBMITTED - user already submitted to same bounty from earlier test attempts
signAndExecute hangs after wallet signs - RPC execution step stalls indefinitely
transaction.toJSON is not a function - signTransaction expects Transaction object, not pre-built Uint8Array bytes
No valid gas coins found - was from old signTransaction+executeTransactionBlock flow, fixed by passing Transaction object to signTransaction
React Rules of Hooks violation - useOnChainBounty and useEffect called after early return in BountyDetail

sessions.notes: Session 026 complete. Full create bounty + submit work flow working end-to-end on testnet. Key dapp-kit insight: signTransaction expects raw Transaction object (not built bytes), dapp-kit calls .toJSON() internally which triggers build with gas coin selection. signAndExecute hangs on RPC execution. Dashboard shows submission previews from localStorage cache. New submission detail page at /submission/$bountyId shows full Walrus content.
